_meta.convention: folder-per-layout: each layout is its own folder (layouts/<folder>/LAYOUT-<name>/) holding layout.json (canonical manifest) + index.html (object/JSON inspector) + preview.html (real to-scale as-built render) + README.md. Diverges from the one-file-per-layout line in DOCUMENTATION-STANDARD v1.1; standard update pending sign-off. PROPOSED next step: extract the inspector into a shared repo-root app (slug fm-layout-viewer) that loads any app's layout.json, so per-layout folders stop shipping an inspector copy and index.html can become the render.
